rationale: Educ. Code §46.008 sets facility adequacy standards for eligibility for state or local tax funding. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue levels, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: All new facilities constructed after September 1, 1998, must meet the standards to be eligible to be financed with state or local tax funds.
_note: Rule concerns facility standards, not tax exemption levels. Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts from reduced local revenue is not a textual conflict with this section.
